problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Combining Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
